name: update
context: Update Linear issue state, assignee, priority, labels, and other fields
info: Updates existing Linear issues via the `issueUpdate` GraphQL mutation or the `client.updateIssue()` SDK method. Takes an issue ID (UUID or identifier like ENG-42) and an input object with the fields to change. Common operations: transitioning workflow state, reassigning, changing priority, adding/removing labels, moving to a project or cycle, updating description, and setting due dates. Agents use this to automate triage, move issues through workflow stages, and sync state from external systems. See [[linear/teams]] for valid workflow state IDs.
triggers: move issue to done in linear

sections.title: State transitions
sections.body: Transition issues by setting `stateId` to a valid workflow state UUID from the issue's team. Query team states via `team.states()`. State types: `backlog`, `unstarted`, `started`, `completed`, `cancelled`. There are no enforced transitions — you can move directly from any state to any other state.

sections.title: Reassigning issues
sections.body: Set `assigneeId` to a user UUID to reassign. Set to `null` to unassign. User UUIDs can be found via `client.users()` or `team.members()`. The assignee receives a notification in Linear.

sections.title: Updating labels
sections.body: The `labelIds` field is a **replacement** — it sets the complete list of labels. To add a label without removing existing ones, first fetch current labels with `issue.labels()`, collect their IDs, then include the new ID in the `labelIds` array. To remove a label, omit its ID from the array.

links.context: Find valid stateIds from team workflow states
Webhook events fire on issue updates

related.note: Need team workflow states for state transitions

scripts.name: Update Linear Issue
scripts.description: Update an existing Linear issue's state, assignee, priority, or other fields

assigneeId.description: UUID of user or null to unassign

author: dojo-community
